---
title: "Muscle Partitioning"
subtitle: "<<<PROJECT_NAME>>>"
date: "<<<DATE>>>"
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
    keep_tex: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
```

| | |
|---|---|
| **Experiment ID** | <<<EXPERIMENT_ID>>> |
| **Date** | <<<DATE>>> |
| **Samples** | <<<N_SAMPLES>>> |

---

## Partitioning Record

```{r partitioning}
partitioning_df <- read.csv("<<<INPUT_CSV>>>", stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)

kable(partitioning_df,
      caption = "Muscle partitioning — fractions and weights",
      booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("striped", "hold_position"), font_size = 9) %>%
  column_spec(1, bold = TRUE)
```

---

## Deviations / Notes

\textcolor{red}{Record any deviations, missing samples, or unexpected tissue appearance here.}

\vspace{3cm}

---

*Generated by generate\_experiment.py — experiment\_id <<<EXPERIMENT_ID>>>*
